title: Add CSS variables for daylight theme
description: Define grayscale CSS variables for daylight theme. Warm, bright base. Applied when data-theme='daylight'.
acceptanceCriteria: Variables for background, foreground, muted, border in styles.css

steps.description: Add daylight theme block in styles.css
steps.details: In lib/src/styles.css, add [data-theme='daylight'] { ... } or :root when daylight. Define --background, --foreground, --muted, --border as grayscale values. Warm off-white background.
If using data-theme, ensure :root has daylight as default so unset case works.

technicalNotes: Use oklch or hex for grayscale; keep consistent with existing shadcn tokens
